sessions_sample.raw: Jog 40 mins (or 4 miles) on hilly course
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The phrase 'on hilly course' may need special handling to ensure it doesn't affect distance parsing.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: Jog 40 mins (or 4 miles) on hilly course
unhandled_patterns.issue: The additional context 'on hilly course' may not be recognized and could be ignored.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Allow for additional descriptors after distance that do not affect the distance value.

prompt_improvements: Recognize and retain additional context after distance values that do not alter the distance itself.
anomalies: The plan includes optional sessions (e.g., 'Rest or brisk 30 min walk') which may complicate session parsing.
